name: Class Reminder
subject: Reminder: {{name}}, your session starts soon!
body_md:
Hi **{{name}}**,

This is a friendly reminder that your **{{title}}** is scheduled.

📅 **Date & Time:** {{scheduled_time}}

Please make sure you're prepared and on time. If you have any questions, reply to this email.

---
Best regards,
**The Training Team**

name: Payment Reminder
subject: Action Required: Payment Due — {{name}}
body_md:
Dear **{{name}}**,

We wanted to remind you that a payment is due on **{{scheduled_time}}**.

💳 Please complete your payment at the earliest to avoid any late fees.

If you've already made the payment, please disregard this message.

---
Regards,
**Finance Team**

name: Assignment Deadline
subject: ⚠️ Deadline Alert: {{title}} — {{name}}
body_md:
Hello **{{name}}**,

Your **{{title}}** submission deadline is approaching!

🗓️ **Due Date:** {{scheduled_time}}

Please ensure you submit your work before the deadline. Late submissions may not be accepted.

Good luck!

---
**Academic Team**
